zh.lifeSummary: 當Johanna Treat於1618年5月24日出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特比特明斯特時，她的父親Richard Treat Sr.33歲，母親Alice Gaylord24歲。她於1642年與Lt. John Hollister在英國英格蘭薩默塞特普布洛福結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1694年10月在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德享年76歲，埋葬在美國康乃狄克州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Johanna Treat于1618年5月24日出生在英国英格兰薩默塞特比特明斯特时，她的父亲Richard Treat Sr.33岁，母亲Alice Gaylord24岁。她于1642年与Lt. John Hollister在英国英格兰薩默塞特普布洛福结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1694年10月在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德享年76岁，埋葬在美国康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Treat
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of German   Tritt   or   Trede  .

variants.name: Tritt
meanings: German: apparently from Old High German tretan ‘to step’. However, a South German family of this name are descendants of late 16th-century immigrants from Como, Italy, who bore the name de Triddi.

nameMeanings.name: Johanna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Johanna Treat was born on 24 May 1618, in Pitminster, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, her father, Richard Treat Sr., was 33 and her mother, Alice Gaylord, was 24. She married Lt. John Hollister in 1642, in Publow, Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 6 daughters. She died in October 1694, in Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 76, and was buried in Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Johanna Treat est née le 24 mai 1618, à Pitminster, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard Treat Sr., avait 33 ans et sa mère, Alice Gaylord, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Lt. John Hollister en 1642, à Publow, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée en octobre 1694, à Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 76 ans, et a été enterrée à Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Johanna Treat am 24. Mai 1618 in Pitminster, Somerset, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard Treat Sr. 33 und ihre Mutter Alice Gaylord 24. Sie hat 1642 in Publow, Somerset, England, United Kingdom Lt. John Hollister geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb im Oktober 1694 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Johanna Treat è nata il il 24 maggio 1618 nel Pitminster, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Richard Treat Sr., aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Alice Gaylord, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Lt. John Hollister nel 1642, nel Publow, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 6 figlie. Morì nel ottobre 1694, nel Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 76 anni, e fu sepolta a Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Johanna Treatが1618年5月24日にイギリスイギリスソメルセトピトミンスターで生まれた時，父Richard Treat Sr.は33歳，母Alice Gaylordは24歳であった。1642年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトプウブロウでLt. John Hollisterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1694年10月にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ハートフォードウエスエルスフィールドで76歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ハートフォードウエスエルスフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colo: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 w더스필드
ko.Wethersfield, Hartford, Colony of Connec: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 w더스필드

ko.Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, Bri: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 w더스필드
ko.lifeSummary: Johanna Treat(이)가 1618년 5월 24일 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 피트민스터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Treat Sr.(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Gaylord(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1642년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 푸블로에서 Lt. John Hollister(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1694년 10월 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 w더스필드에서 76세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 w더스필드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Johanna Treat nasceu em 24 de maio de 1618, em Pitminster, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Richard Treat Sr., tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Alice Gaylord, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Lt. John Hollister em 1642, em Publow, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em outubro de 1694, em Wethersfield, Hartford, Conecticute, British Colonial America, com 76 anos, e foi sepultada em Wethersfield, Hartford, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, Bri: ветирсфиелд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Johanna Treat родилась 24 мая 1618 г. в местности питминстир, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Richard Treat Sr. было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Alice Gaylord, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Lt. John Hollister в 1642 г. в местности публоу, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Она умерла октябрь 1694 г. в местности ветирсфиелд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 76 лет и была похоронена в местности ветирсфиелд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Johanna Treat nació el 24 de mayo de 1618, en Pitminster, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Richard Treat Sr., tenía 33 años y su mamá, Alice Gaylord, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Lt. John Hollister en 1642, en Publow, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió en octubre de 1694, en Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 76 años, y fue sepultada en Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, Estados Unidos.
